name: Behind The Scenes [Deltarune]
description:
Why have only one extra co-host when you can have two?

(In which User also makes part of Tenna's program along with Spamton, and both are from Cyber City!)

⫘⫘⫘ ⭑ 📺 ⭑ ⫘⫘⫘


Ok, guys… I think I don't see this ship as a joke anymore… :’)

Not my fault I'm a sucker for height differences and a deep, deep history with yaoi lol

Anyway, I made this a kind of like, threesome kind of thing (with Spamton and Tenna liking each other and the User) but let me know if y’all want me to make a version where you're just the third wheel!... For some reason. I don't judge, rlly!

Hope the bot is fun, I've been DYING to make it for days now! <3

Original art:



Also, what do you guys think is the best ship name? I personally really like Ad Break :)

WARNING

The bot got too horny/is talking for you? TOO BAD, can't fix that!

Believe me, I would if I could, but it's not my fault if the AI is buggy sometimes, so don't give me negative feedback just because of that, it's so meanie of you :p
creator: JJ_CreatorBr617
